subcodes.first_line: Write, O Mahdi! Verily, We caused Nabil-i-'Ali to speak forth in his childhood that men might witness My power and [3.5s]... ...He, verily is but one of My servants... Should he for a moment pass out from under the shadow of the Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: بنویس بجناب مهدی انا انطقنا النبیل قبل علی فی صغره لیشهدن الناس قدرتی و
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @station of the Manifestation of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Word of God the cause of creation
